---
title: "Alienation and Trust in Climate Scientists in the US"
format:
  html:
    code-tools: false
    toc: false
sidebar: false
---

```{r echo=FALSE}
yaml_metadata <- rmarkdown::yaml_front_matter(here::here("preregistration/preregistration.qmd"))
title <- yaml_metadata$title
abstract <- yaml_metadata$abstract
```

### Abstract

`r abstract`
